title: stenandrium nanum
intro: Stenandrium nanum, also known as Dwarf Stenandra, is a small flowering plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The leaves of Stenandrium nanum have been traditionally used to reduce fever, relieve congestion, and ease coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, providing health benefits like improved lung function and reduced inflammation. In herbal preparations, the leaves are often dried and made into teas or infusions, or used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and remedies for respiratory ailments.
